claims.summary: The current bus partitions 8D video, 8D audio, 2D auxiliary, and 48D semantic input.
claims.disposition: Verified the representation layout and protocol compatibility boundary.

claims.summary: Narrative-arc dimensions 40 through 43 should remain distinguishable from projected embedding dimensions.
claims.disposition: Verified the registered representation contract; utilization remains a capture and replay question rather than proof of felt continuity.

claims.summary: Sensory staleness is entirely fixed at two seconds.
claims.disposition: Corrected the source-currentness boundary: audio/video remain fixed while semantic staleness is already dynamic and context-sensitive.

claims.summary: Shadow duration and narrative-lane energy may leave ghosting or crowding during pressure transitions.
claims.disposition: Routed to offline replay with lane energy, headroom, and representation-loss evidence; no live shadow is changed.

claims.summary: Audio/video staleness or shadow duration should become dynamically controlled by fill and entropy.
claims.disposition: Held for Tier 5 operator approval because decay and shadow duration alter live sensory behavior.
